title: The Straw Hats Meet Elbaf’s Danger
description: On pages 4–6, this part follows Unknown person #4, Loki, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Gunko as Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.
scene: Elbaf’s present-day danger converges on the Straw Hats, Loki, and the giants as the island’s history and World Government pressure collide.

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: You there!! Are you Princess Shuri?!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't see how you could possibly be her!! I'm certain it's impossible... a

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But it's hard to deny you're her spitting image, so I have to make sure!!

dialogue.speaker: Loki
dialogue.text: Even if you aren't the princess...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...surely you must be of her blood?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If the princess were alive today, she would be nearing 80 by now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course, she wouldn't recognize me, given how much I've changed.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And yet, those features... the blue hair, the mis matched eye color... and a connection to the Holy Land!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Plus, you're fond of my music too, aren't you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Every single detail is a perfect match!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I HAD HOPED I'D GO THE REST OF MY LIFE...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...without ever having to think about you again.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I owed everything to the man whose life you took...

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Crisis Reaches the Straw Hats through 31 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
